notes: Mistral AI's multimodal model family (Pixtral 12B, Pixtral Large). Blend of 'pixel' + 'Mistral,' so '-tral' rhymes with sibling Mistral/Mixtral entries (TRAHL, long ah). Front-loaded stress PIKS-trahl is most common; second-syllable piks-TRAHL (matching some Mixtral speakers) also heard. No creator pronunciation guide published.
